input.prompt: Bubble chart of roxabi services: x-axis = weekly active requests, y-axis = avg response time (ms), bubble size = memory usage (MB). Services: lyra-hub (4200 req, 12ms, 512MB), voiceCLI (800 req, 340ms, 2400MB), llmCLI (3100 req, 2800ms, 180MB), imageCLI (120 req, 8500ms, 6200MB), roxabi-vault (650 req, 8ms, 96MB). Label each bubble.

notes: bubble template with 5 services, three quantitative dimensions (x/y/size); exercises bubble radius scaling, label placement inside/outside bubble based on size, and wide dynamic range on both axes.
